description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, open-plan layout. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows along one side, allowing for ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoors. The exterior walls are finished in a neutral tone, and the roof is flat, contributing to a contemporary architectural style. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, including bedrooms, a kitchen, living areas, and bathrooms, with visible interior partitions and doors. The main entrance is prominent, and the building includes both private and communal spaces. The overall design emphasizes functionality, simplicity, and integration with its urban surroundings.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large floor-to-ceiling windows, flat roof, and a neutral exterior, featuring multiple rooms and an open-plan layout.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, extensive glass windows along the front, and a clear view into the living and dining areas.
description_view_1: This angle shows the rear and side of the bungalow, with smaller windows and a more enclosed appearance, as well as the kitchen and utility areas.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the side facade with additional large windows and a view into the bedrooms and bathrooms.
description_view_3: This view reveals the back of the bungalow, including private rooms and a glimpse of interior artwork and furnishings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front and side windows
